allow: PowerShell(Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'postgres|sql' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'password'; CREATE DATABASE pulseops;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data\\log\\" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Get-Content $_.FullName -Tail 20 })
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = ''; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'password'; CREATE DATABASE pulseops;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -match 'node|next' -or $_.ProcessName -eq 'node' } | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 7248 } | Stop-Process -Force 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "killed")

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Documents\\GitHub\\PulseOps\\pulseops; Start-Process -FilePath "powershell" -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "npm run dev" -WindowStyle Minimized; $timeout = 40; $elapsed = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $elapsed += 2; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } while \(-not $conn -and $elapsed -lt $timeout\); if \($conn\) { "Ready" } else { "Timeout" })
